full_text:
Liu Gui 劉璝
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Gui (劉璝). Sent to hold Luocheng, he advised visiting a local sage. Cut down by Zhang Yi. Liu Gui was affiliated with Liu Zhang. Liu Gui lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
